title: hoofboots
body:
## Ever wanted your horse to have Frost Walker? How about depth strider and soul speed for your skeleton horse? Feather Falling for your... uh... llama? If you can ride it, you can put boots on it. Yes...sigh...even a saddled pig.
By Fufrik and Galdeveer

## Boots on Mounts
Right-click a saddled or tamed ridable mob while holding a pair of boots to equip it onto the mob. If boots are already equipped, they will be dropped onto the ground. Right-click the mob with a shovel to use it like a shoehorn and pry the boots off. The boots cannot be equipped/unequipped while the horse is being ridden. You cannot unequip non-boot items that are placed into a mob's boots slot by another datapack.
All enchants you can put onto a pair of boots work. This allows your mounts to get the benefits of boot enchants and the extra defense of an extra piece of armor.

## Enchanted Golden Apples
Normally in Vanilla Minecraft feeding an enchanted golden apple to a horse is no better than feeding it a normal golden apple, but this pack changes that. Feeding a horse an enchanted golden apple gives it 5 minutes of speed IV, resistance I, and fire resistance I. This is mostly the same as what players get but tweaked for horses.

## Planned Features
Will eventually be adding the ability to enchant horse armor once I've fixed a vanilla bug that clears the nbt off of horse armor when equipped via right-click.
Also planning on adding mounted ender-pearling support.
Lastly, I plan on adding a joke feature for equipping elytra onto pigs.

Original concept by Fufrik.
